english_text: The prize is a lot of money
We need to work as a team
I didn't sign up for this
I can't believe you did that
The rich play with people's lives

korean_text: 일어난 일을 절대 잊지 않을 거야
romanization: ireonan ireul jeoldae itji aneul geoya

korean_text: 우리는 더 나은 걸 받을 자격이 있어
romanization: urineun deo naeun geol badeul jagyeogi isseo
